title: NVIDIA GTC 2026: Live Updates on What’s Next in AI | NVIDIA Blog
text:
Hermes Unlocks Self-Improving AI Agents, Powered by NVIDIA RTX PCs and DGX Spark
Agentic AI is changing the way users get work done. Following the success of OpenClaw, the community is embracing new open source agentic frameworks. The latest is Hermes Agent, which...
